description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine change_cctswsomod_var_2, and is implemented by a call to change_cctswsomod_var_2. Use this API to change the value of VAR of the “other” type model attached to a specified switched shunt. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.8.0. ierr = change_cctswsomod_var(ibus, model, j, rdata)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Switched shunt bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Var number to change (j is relative to the start of the block of vars assigned to this model, e,g., 1 for first var(l), 2 for var(l+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: rdata
parameters.description: New var value. (input; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: no CCT table entry for the model.
model names do not match - model is aaa not xxx.
no VARs used in the model.
VAR number outside of the VAR range of this model.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
